name: Savory Omelette's
recipeInstructions:
Basic omelette: In an 8-inch skillet over medium heat, melt margarine. Pour egg beaters into the skillet and cook, lifting edges to allow uncooked portions to run underneath. When almost set, spoon desired filling onto half of the eggs. Fold the other half over the top. Slide off a warm plate and serve immediately.
For fillings: Cook ingredients in margarine until vegetables are tender. Per serving: 110 calories; 206 mg sodium; 0 mg cholesterol; 4 gm total fat; 0 gm saturated fat.
